open_items.description: On the next wake, review the recalled context for the tiny live autonomy pilot and decide a single concrete next experiment step (e.g., a narrow, measurable behavior or metric to track) without changing the overall pilot scope.
open_items.scope: Interpret the recalled pilot context and select exactly one next experiment step; do not expand scope, create additional open items, or schedule more wakes.

response: Initialized the first tiny live autonomy pilot and set up one bounded follow-up item with a scheduled wake to resolve it.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve the initial pilot follow-up by choosing one concrete next experiment step based on the recalled context.
